key.name: endpoint-url
key.description: The base URL of the speech-to-text API endpoint. The extension appends /v1/audio/transcriptions automatically.

key.name: api-provider
key.description: API provider preset: openai, openrouter, or custom

key.name: api-model
key.description: Model name sent to the transcription API

key.name: recording-quality
key.description: Audio recording quality setting (low, medium, high)

key.name: enable-notifications
key.description: Show notifications for recording status and results

key.name: recording-limit-seconds
key.description: Maximum recording duration in seconds (5-300 seconds)

key.name: enhanced-terminal-support
key.description: Use terminal-specific paste methods for better compatibility with terminal applications

key.name: mute-media-during-recording
key.description: Automatically pause playing media players to reduce background noise during voice recording

key.name: debug-mode
key.description: When enabled, a debug window will appear and receive typed text instead of the active application, allowing you to verify the transcription and typing method.

key.name: toggle-recording-shortcut
key.description: Keyboard shortcut to toggle voice recording on/off

key.name: auto-insert
key.description: Automatically type or paste transcribed text into the focused application. When disabled, text is only copied to the clipboard.

key.name: keep-clipboard-after-paste
key.summary: Keep transcription on clipboard after paste
key.description: When auto-insert uses the clipboard+paste fallback, keep the transcribed text on the clipboard afterwards. When disabled (default), the previous clipboard text is restored so the transcription is not left behind. Non-text clipboard contents (images, files) cannot be preserved.
